headline: Domino’s Slice Sauce And Shinola Tie Up Test Brand And Valuation Narrative
summary: Domino’s Pizza (NasdaqGS:DPZ) has launched its first proprietary dipping sauce, called Slice Sauce, as part of a limited time promotion. While the company has previously offered a range of multiple sauces, this is its first in house branded dipping sauce. The campaign includes an exclusive collaboration with lifestyle brand Shinola, giving qualifying customers password access to branded watches and accessories. The move is aimed at deepening customer loyalty and setting Domino’s apart in the...
